name: mouse_mhc_h2_complex
description: Mouse Major Histocompatibility Complex (H-2) on chromosome 17 (~3.6 Mb, ~200 genes). Class I region (K, D, L) and Class II region (I-A, I-E) plus Class III (complement, TNF, HSP70). Highly polymorphic across mouse strains (haplotypes H-2b in C57BL/6, H-2d in BALB/c, H-2k in CBA/C3H, etc.). Class I and Class II classical genes share 60-90% identity across paralogs (H2-K1 vs H2-D1 vs H2-L) creating systematic mapping ambiguity. Reference is the C57BL/6J H-2b haplotype.
